docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,850.00 FILED BY MORABITO, ANTHONY "TONY" AS TO DEFENDANT MOON, CHONG MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOON, CHONG MR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORABITO, ANTHONY "TONY" RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOON, CHONG MR. $2,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,890.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO CHONG MOON RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
